descripcion: Listen and type sentences about clothes!

misiones.instruccion: Press Play to hear the sentence. Then type it!

retos.pista: I am w______ a s____ (5 words)
retos.explicacion: I am wearing a shirt = Estoy usando una camisa

retos.pista: She is w______ a d____ (5 words)
retos.explicacion: She is wearing a dress = Ella está usando un vestido
Put on your shoes = Ponte tus zapatos
He has a hat = Él tiene un sombrero
I like my jacket = Me gusta mi chaqueta
Where are my socks = Dónde están mis calcetines
